## 🚀 Package Submission

> ⚠️ **Before submitting**, please make sure you have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.

---

## 📦 Package Details

**Package Name**
<!-- Unique identifier, lowercase, no spaces (e.g. neovim, my-tool) -->

**Display Name**
<!-- Human-readable name (e.g. Neovim, My Tool) -->

**Version**
<!-- Current version being submitted (e.g. v1.2.3) -->

**Category**
<!-- Choose one: Tools / Development / Security / Networking / Media / Utility / Other -->

**Short Description** *(max 100 characters)*
<!-- One-line description shown in the app store -->

**Full Description**
<!-- Detailed description of the package, its features and use cases -->

---

## 🔗 Links

**Source Repository**
<!-- https://github.com/author/package -->

**Official Website** *(optional)*
<!-- https://example.com -->

**License**
<!-- e.g. MIT, GPL-3.0, Apache-2.0 -->

---

## 📥 Download Information

| Architecture | Download URL | SHA256 |
|---|---|---|
| aarch64 | | |
| arm | | |
| x86_64 | | |
| i686 | | |

> Leave empty if architecture is not supported.

---

## 📋 Package Metadata

**Maintainer Name**
<!-- Your name or GitHub username -->

**Maintainer GitHub**
<!-- @yourusername -->

**Homepage URL**
<!-- URL to show in the store (repo, website, etc) -->

---

## 🧪 Testing

**Have you tested this package on Termux?**
- [ ] Yes, tested and working
- [ ] Partially tested
- [ ] Not tested yet

**Tested on Android version(s)**
<!-- e.g. Android 12, Android 13 -->

**Tested on architecture(s)**
<!-- e.g. aarch64 -->

**Installation command used for testing**
```bash
# Paste your test installation command here
```

**Output / Result**
```
# Paste the output here
```

---

## 📝 Additional Notes

<!-- Any special installation notes, dependencies, or known issues -->

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Package name is unique and not already in the store
- [ ] All download URLs are direct links to the actual files
- [ ] SHA256 checksums are provided for all supported architectures
- [ ] Package has been tested on Termux
- [ ] License is open source or allows redistribution
- [ ] I am the maintainer or have permission to submit this package
- [ ] Package does not contain malware or malicious code
